chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2686 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَنَامُ عَلَى وَجْهِهِ وَ هُوَ عَلَى رَاحِلَتِهِ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِذَلِكَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2686 - He was asked about a person in the state of ihram sleeping on their face while on their mount.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in that."
